question:
Why is financial literacy generally considered empowering?
A) It allows individuals to legally print their own money.
B) It guarantees that a person will become a billionaire overnight.
C) It gives individuals the knowledge to make informed decisions, avoid predatory debt, and secure independence.
D) It makes a person immune to paying taxes.
